message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "browser" as B
participant "listener" as L
participant "sequence_1" as S1
participant "http_inbound_travelocity" as H1
participant "OIDC_IdP" as OIDC
participant "http_inbound_commonauth" as H2
participant "sequence_2" as S2

B ->> L: SAML login request
L ->> S1: SAML login request
B ->> H1: SAML login request
S1 ->> H1: request
note over S1, H1: SAML request process
note over S1, H1: OIDC request build
S1 ->> H1: Redirect to IDP
B ->> OIDC: Redirect to IDP
H2 ->> OIDC: login page
B ->> OIDC: Submit credentials
OIDC ->> H2: ID token
H2 ->> S2: ID token
note over S2: OIDC response process
note over S2: SAML response build
S2 ->> H2: SAML response
H2 ->> B: SAML response

@enduml
